title: PocketDimensionPlots
description: PocketDimensionPlots gives all players a personal plot in a void dimension so they can build unhindered by other players
body:
# PocketDimensionPlots Overview: PocketDimensionPlots gives all players a personal plot in a void dimension so they can build unhindered by other players. It includes a configuration file that allows you to customise the plots' size, the teleport sound, what blocks the initial plot is made of, and much more. There is also a solid whitelist and TPA-style command system to invite other players to your plot. ## PocketDimensionPlots Community: Myself, along with other players of PocketDimensionPlots, can found at our Discord. There is also [a Guilded server](https://www.guilded.gg/i/Wkn138B2) for those who prefer to join it instead of Discord. ## PocketDimensionPlots Requirements: PocketDimensionPlots requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to be installed and cannot be used without it. PocketDimensionPlots works as a Server-Side mod but can be joined with a vanilla client or be used in Singleplayer. ### Main Features: - Adds a new Dimension called Void, which allows players to create a plot with either a small or large starting island - Plots have an invisible barrier that keeps players contained and prevents flying machines from escaping onto other player's plots - Players can add their friends to their plot via a whitelist which allows those players to join without permission and when the owner is offline - If players are not whitelisted, they will send a request that the owner can accept or ignore - Similarly, if a guest on a plot is no longer wanted, they can be kicked - The spawn point of the plot can be set either with the command (/pdp) or by right-clicking a bed - Players can sleep in their plots to skip the night in the Overworld. Players sleeping in the Overworld require players in plots to sleep too - Server-side, compatible with Vanilla clients and works in Singleplayer too - Players can use a configurable Item (default is a feather) instead of typing /pdp to enter and exit their plots for easy access - Built-in Update Checker - Mod Support - [**Gobber**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber-fabric) - Prevents the use of Teleport Rings to get in and out of Plots - [**Cloth Config**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Adjust the Config with Guided Tooltips when using in Singleplayer
Default Config (with Notes):

{

"teleportItem": "minecraft:feather", //Set to minecraft:air to disable

"teleportSound": "minecraft:entity.enderman.teleport", //Sound Played When Teleporting to Plot

"teleportRequestTimeout": 30, //Seconds Before Request Expires

"teleportEnterMessage": true, //Show Teleport Enter Message

"teleportExitMessage": true, //Show Teleport Exit Message

"smallIslandXSize": 5, //Small Island Size X

"smallIslandYSize": 5, //Small Island Size Y

"smallIslandZSize": 5, //Small Island Size Z

"smallIslandTopBlock": "minecraft:grass_block", //The Top Layer of the Spawn Island

"smallIslandMainBlock": "minecraft:dirt", //The Main Layers of the Spawn Island

"largeIslandXSize": 15, //Large Island Size X

"largeIslandYSize": 30, //Large Island Size Y

"largeIslandZSize": 15, //Large Island Size Z

"largeIslandTopBlock": "minecraft:grass_block", //The Top Layer of the Spawn Island

"largeIslandMainBlock": "minecraft:dirt", //The Main Layers of the Spawn Island

"plotBorderRadius": 250, //Players and Pistons Aren't Allowed Past this Border

"plotCenterYLevel": 63, //The Top Layer of the Island will Start Here

"plotSpreadDistance": 1000, //The Distance Between Plot Centers. Must be at least Double the Border Radius

"allowSleepingInPlots": true, //Will Link Sleeping with the Overworld

"allowBedToSetSpawn": true, //Trying to Sleep will Reset the Plot's Spawn Point

"serverLang": "en_us", //Language when not in Singleplayer

"disableUpdateCheck": false //Disable Update Checker Message

}

## Supported Languages: **English (US)** - en_us **Spanish/Español (España)** - es_es **Japanese/日本語** - ja_jp **Russian/Русский** - ru_ru **Chinese (Simplified) /简体中文** - zh_cn **Chinese (Traditional) /繁體中文** - zh_tw   ## Minecraft Version: Please do not ask for PocketDimensionPlots to be ported to an older version of Minecraft. coolsim intends to maintain Minecraft versions (1.18 & 1.19) backporting to a version older than 1.14 is not possible for Fabric. coolsim will begin to update PocketDimensionPlots to 1.20 as the corresponding Fabric Full Release version is released, so please don't ask. Please do ask for a Forge port if you want one though.   ## License and Modpacks: Please feel free to use PocketDimensionPlots in any modpack whilst making sure to give credit to coolsim. Do not redistribute PocketDimensionPlots in any form.
